steps.title: Identify what comes after the comma
steps.content: The blank follows a comma after an independent clause and is followed by “researchers a glimpse into ages long gone” — an object structure awaiting a verb form.

steps.title: Apply the participle rule
steps.content:
A comma followed by a participle correctly forms a modifying phrase about the subject of the preceding clause.

Choice D's “providing” creates the participial phrase “providing researchers a glimpse into ages long gone,” which describes what the Pyramid does.

The other three use a finite verb form (B), an infinitive (A), or a bare verb (C), none of which fit the structural requirement.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
